notes: Captured Admin GraphQL 2025-01 CustomerInput validation and normalization matrix for customerCreate and customerUpdate: invalid email/phone/locale, duplicate email/phone identity, blank/null scalar handling, tag trim/de-duplication/sorting and max length, oversized name/note fields, and update attempts after delete/merge. Runtime parity is enforced by customer-draft-flow integration tests because this matrix requires multi-step setup, failed-mutation state invariance checks, and downstream readback across staged customer/metafield state.
